raw_text: alberto araiz bitar albertoaraizb@gmail.com 608978323 c/anunciadora n23, madrid, 28224 education bachelors degree in aerospace engineering, universidad politécnica de madrid (upm), 2017-2022. science and technologys baccalaureate, colegio sagrados corazones (madrid), recipient of excellence recognition obtaining a grade of 13 over 14. kumon: (2011-2014): all levels completed. flow3d y flowpost (2020-present): formation as an employee for 60 hours as an initial course followed by weekly assistance (5 hours/week) for 14 months. work experience engineer in castflow valves s.l. working in the design, calculation and optimization of different types of valves, using various programs as flowsd, flowpost, solidworks and autocad (2020-present). tutor for baccalaureate students in mathematics, physics and english (2017- present). instructor in various summer camps as an english teacher and tennis coach. part-time associate in kais affordable tree maintenance during my highschool junior year in hawaii, as a tree-drilling worker. languages spanish: native speaker. english: bilingual. - cambridge certificate in proficiency english (c2) awarded by escuela oficial de idiomas (eoi). - junior year of baccalaureate completed in eeuu (2016). - summers as an exchange student in ireland (2011-2013). chinese: basic-intermediate level. french: intermediate-fluent level. skills computer skills: - matlab: intermediate level. - catia: high level. - solidworks: high level. - flow3d y flowpost: high level. - autocad: high level. public speaking skills. strong team player. effective time management and ability to work under pressure. extracurricular activities e member of fundacion rafael el pino for high capacities students. e sports: - national indoor soccer champion as a player for inter movistar (age 13). - tennis coach. - surf. - snowboarding.
